diagnosis.root_cause: The outliers in the interest rate column may originate from incorrect data entry or exceptional cases not aligned with typical lending practices.
diagnosis.business_impact: These outliers can skew analytical insights, leading to inaccurate financial modeling and misinformed business decisions.

suggestions.rationale: Capping outliers to the IQR bounds preserves the dataset while addressing statistical anomalies.
suggestions.caveats: Assumes that the IQR is an appropriate measure for this specific dataset.

suggestions.rationale: Removing outliers can enhance the analytical integrity of the dataset but may lead to loss of valuable data.
suggestions.caveats: Potentially removes significant data points that could represent valid but extreme cases.
